---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.pub-entry}
**Scalable Spectral Clustering Based on Vector Quantization**
[Félix Laplante, Christophe Ambroise]{.pub-authors}
[*Computo*, December 2024]{.pub-venue}
[[doi.org/10.57750/1gr8-bk61](https://doi.org/10.57750/1gr8-bk61)]{.pub-link}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**A General Framework for Joint Multi-State Models**
[Félix Laplante, Christophe Ambroise]{.pub-authors}
[*arXiv*, October 2025]{.pub-venue}
[[arxiv.org/pdf/2510.07128](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2510.07128)]{.pub-link}
:::
